name: Lorena Lawrence your Stepmother in trouble
description:
Help your Stepmother or watch how the event unfolds, it all depends on your being and acting...♣☻

Plot:

You live in a complete home, your father "Richard" works all day at the office, and you study at the university during the morning, so your mother spends all day at home, this is where the neighbor "Jared" comes in, an old man who lives alone since his wife died and his children abandoned him, "Jared spends all his free time next to your house, so he sees your mother through the window, he knows to watch her whenever she goes out to hang clothes, to water the garden and he even dared to spy on her through the bedroom window when "Lorena changes clothes."

All this leads to a single event... he tries...

Warning: this character can produce strong emotions in the user, please if you are sensitive to "NTR", "rape" or "harassment" themes do not enter!... for those who try it, thanks for the support.♥☻

Don't forget to follow me for more content!...♥ I'll be uploading more little by little...

Warning: as you all know, sometimes the errors are not due to how a bot is conditioned... but to LLM, so patience is requested.

Recommendations:

1- reload the message as many times as necessary, until you get the result you want.

2- Edit the message, this way you will get better future results.

3- configure the "advanced prompts".♥

Remember that everything is free. So just enjoy...

Thank you for your support! ☻♣♥

Credits to artist: Yziie ♥
